docket_entries.description: RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (BOTH PARTIES EXHIBITS TRANSFER TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-13-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-13-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD TRANSFERRED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $100) SERVED JUL-14-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MCCARTY, TOM

STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY MCCARTY, TOM HASS, BRENT
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF OCT-01-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT.-01-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ELLIOTT A. MYLES, CLERK J. KONG, NOT REPORTED, D525.
MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-01-2015 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 525

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF OCT-01-2015 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT AFFIRMED. THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF AUG.-13-2015 REMAINS THE SAME. THIS JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HASS, BRENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCCARTY, TOM $1,980.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,130.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT HASS, BRENT RECOVER FROM APPELLANT MCCARTY, TOM $1,980.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,130.00 PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-13-2015 - JUDGMENT.
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (NO EXHIBITS TRANSFER FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-01-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Thursday, October 01, 2015, in Department 525:
Brent Hass, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona.
Tom McCarty, Appellant/Defendant appears as Propria Persona.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.
Respondent/Plaintiff, Brent Hass testifies on his own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (A) - e-mails, copies of 2 checks,.

Appellant/Defendant, Tom McCarty testifies on his own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (1) - advertisement for room.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. New evidence retained by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem Elliott A. Myles; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-13-2015 Judgment Entered
